calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Petitioner: Rubin Scroggins, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Connie Madison.
Brian Madison, the minor's father is also present in court.
Parties were sworn and examined.
Mr. Madison is not a Petitioner but consenting to the name change in open court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Danielle Rosa Madison.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Reset To Dec-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Robin Scroggins, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for Minor: Connie Madison.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and Proof of Publication, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Dec.12, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218. Petitioner to file Proof of Publication and minor's father to appear or give consent.
